creator: wildzander@gmail.com
text:
Regards
System after clean installation. Installed from FreeBSD-13.2-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso. No changes made, default language, default keyboard layout, default font, no X.
The "Del", "Insert", "PageUp", "PageDown" and "0" keys on the numeric keypad (numlock disabled) work poorly in the console. After pressing them, the " ~ " character appears. In programs like nano and mcedit they work correctly.
